name: Maunawili Falls
tagline: A 20-ft jungle cascade with a swimming hole and cliff-jump rock — best legal swim-at-falls on the windward side.
parking: Very limited street parking at end of Kelewina St — arrive before 8am
bestTime: Early morning before 8am to get parking and beat crowds
talkStory: The trail is muddy and has multiple stream crossings — wear shoes you don't mind getting wet. About 3 miles round trip. The swimming hole at the base is the reward; there's a rock ledge people jump from (check depth first). Bring a waterproof bag for your phone. Mosquito repellent is a must.
